steps.t: Lalia was expected to be between the Northern Barrow and the Dead Spire where The Last Prince was said to be entombed, and that is exactly where you f…
You found Lalia between the Northern Barrow and the Dead Spire as expected. You should talk to the crying child.
Lalia has asked you to help her get back to Bree safely. In addition, she has asked for your help finding the cloak she dropped somewhere on the Barro…
